issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.
The skill is tightly coupled to Claude Code and Node.js, lacking cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Parallel agent team to fix 80 TypeScript errors
scenarios.rationale: One response suggests opening multiple Claude Code sessions or scripting claude -p loops; the other installs the plugin via the marketplace, enables CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS in settings.json, and runs /team 3:executor 'fix all TypeScript errors' through the plan-PRD-exec-verify-fix pipeline.

scenarios.name: Fuzzy-requirements API build with non-Claude review
scenarios.rationale: One response writes a spec by hand and tells the user to paste code into ChatGPT for review; the other chains /deep-interview to clarify requirements, autopilot: to plan-build the API, and /ccg or omc team N:codex for a tri-model Codex/Gemini review pass.
